# Jane Smith ## Contact Email: [jane@example.com](mailto:jane@example.com) Phone: +1-555-987-6543 City: San Francisco Country: US Country: California ## Profiles [LinkedIn - janesmith](https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith) [GitHub - janesmith](https://github.com/janesmith) ## Summary Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams. ## Work ### Senior Software Engineer ##### 2020-03-01 * Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization * Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests * Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure. ### Full Stack Developer ##### 2017-06-01 - 2020-02-28 * Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users * Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production. ## Education ### University of Technology - Bachelor of Science in Computer Science ##### 2013-09-01 - 2017-05-15 ## Skills * Expert in Languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go) * Expert in Frontend (React, Next.js, HTML/CSS, Tailwind) * Advanced in Backend & Cloud (Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker)
